creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text: The point is that this is a decision that is the maintainer's (sunpoet) choice as this behavior is part of VB as supplied by Oracle and the maintainer needs to choose whether to change this behavior. It's simply not a bug as everything works as designed. (And I don't really care for this, myself.) It seems that mail to sunpoet or a discussion on the mailing list would be more appropriate.
